summary: Planned one conservative non-mutating classification for each open PR in the live inventory shard. No shared canonical was selected because the job explicitly says this is not a dedupe cluster, and no PR has enough evidence for duplicate, superseded, fixed-by-candidate, low-signal closeout, merge, fix, or security routing.

actions.reason: Open focused UI PR with unique implementation and no hydrated duplicate or replacement candidate in this shard; failing checks and needs-proof label make close/merge inappropriate.
Open focused Control UI PR with no shared canonical and no closeout basis; it should remain available for maintainer review rather than be closed in this inventory job.
Meaningful open contributor PR with unique scope and no hydrated duplicate or replacement path; cannot close a useful uneditable PR without a replacement fix plan, and this job disallows fixes.
Open focused agent-schema PR with sufficient proof and no duplicate/superseding evidence in the hydrated shard; it should remain independent for maintainer review.
Maintainer-owned draft PR with broad QA scope and no low-signal or superseded evidence; it should stay open as independent maintainer work.
